title: RIID-4690: Full Daemon Lifecycle CLI Wiring

blocks.text: This slice restores the public-safe `riido daemon ...` process lifecycle adapter.

items: Provider-runtime, runtime-scheduling, CLI migration, and daemon migration SSOT updates

Public CI for foreground/background start, local IPC status/health/ready/metrics, cooperative stop, PID fallback, logs, env config, source selection, public import boundaries, and local-only listener checks

blocks.text: The CLI adapter wires public runtimeactor, supervisor, and provider adapters to public control-plane sources: in-memory offline mode, file queue, `riido-task-db.v1` through taskdbplane, and SaaS assignment HTTP through saasplane.

items: Desktop-launched SaaS uses `RIIDO_DEVICE_ID` and `RIIDO_DEVICE_SECRET` with dynamic `/v1/daemon/agent-bindings`.

blocks.text: Legacy `RIIDO_SAAS_AGENTS` and `RIIDO_SAAS_TOKEN` are no longer daemon settings. This slice does not move server HTTP, SSE, Terraform/AWS/deploy evidence, packaging artifacts, private infra, secrets, provider CLI bundling, App Store/MSIX helper packaging, or local machine state.
